name: v0.dev
description: Generative UI system by Vercel. Build React components, landing pages, and complex interfaces using natural language prompts.
bestFor: Rapidly prototyping high-fidelity React components and UI layouts.

name: Cursor
description: The AI-native code editor. Features advanced codebase indexing, real-time code generation, and intelligent refactoring.
bestFor: Deep coding sessions where you need AI that understands your entire project context.

name: Bolt.new
description: Full-stack web development in the browser. Prompt, run, edit, and deploy entire applications from a single interface.
bestFor: Building and deploying full-stack prototypes in minutes without local setup.

name: Framer AI
description: AI-powered site generation and design. Transform text prompts into fully responsive, high-end websites with complex animations.
bestFor: Creating professional landing pages and marketing sites with world-class motion design.

name: Canva Magic
description: AI-driven graphic design suite. Includes Magic Media for image/video generation and Magic Edit for intelligent image manipulation.
bestFor: Quick social media assets, presentations, and non-technical design workflows.

name: Spline AI
description: 3D design for the web. Use AI to generate 3D objects, textures, and interactive scenes that run natively in the browser.
bestFor: Adding immersive 3D elements and interactive spatial UI to web projects.

name: Midjourney
description: The industry standard for high-fidelity AI image generation. Known for its artistic quality and complex prompt understanding.
bestFor: Generating high-end concept art, textures, and visual inspiration for UI themes.

name: Replicate
description: A cloud platform for running open-source machine learning models. Access thousands of models for image, video, and text processing.
bestFor: Developers who need API access to the latest open-source AI models like Flux or Stable Diffusion.

name: Krea AI
description: Real-time creative suite. Features an AI canvas for instant image generation and high-quality upscaling/enhancement.
bestFor: Real-time visual brainstorming and upscaling low-res assets into production-ready images.
